login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Please sign in to your account.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join us and start ordering your favorite pizzas!
register.name: Full name

success.title: Registration successful
success.message: Please check your email to verify your account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enter the verification token sent to your email.

success.title: Email verified!
success.message: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset token.

success.title: Reset token sent
success.message: Use the token below to reset your password.

error.generic: Failed to request password reset. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the reset token and your new password.

success.title: Password reset!
success.message: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

error.generic: Password reset failed. Please try again.

avatar.invalidType: Please select a valid image file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP)
avatar.fileTooLarge: Image is too large. Please select a smaller file.
avatar.uploadError: Failed to process image. Please try again.

crop.title: Adjust photo
crop.instructions: Drag to reposition, scroll to zoom

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
